title: Moonshot AI launches Kimi K3 via API, holds back model weights until 27 July
watch: 27 July 2026 weight release -> confirms/denies parameter count and enables independent benchmark reproduction; upgrade capability claims from vendor-claim to confirmed if reproduced
Any independent, same-harness benchmark run comparing K3 to rival models
Whether 'largest open-weight model' holds up once weights and independent size analysis are public
